overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a wizard character exploring a snowy castle terrace at night. The character walks along stone pathways, passes through archways, ascends and descends staircases, and crosses bridges illuminated by warm lanterns and fire braziers against a cold blue night sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone terrace pathway beside the castle wall, passing vintage street lamps

entered.detail: tall stone wall of the castle with snow dusted on the ledges
black iron fence running along the edge of the terrace
ornate black lamppost with warm glowing light
stone tile pathway with patches of snow
snow-covered pine tree visible in the distance against the dark sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snowy castle terrace at night, with a tall stone wall on the right and vintage street lamps providing warm light. The pathway is partially covered in snow, and distant evergreen trees are visible against the dark blue sky.

events.description: entering the covered stone archway tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking through the large stone archway into the covered passage

entered.detail: large stone archway forming the entrance to the covered passage
large ornamental stone urns flanking the archway entrance
massive stone columns supporting the archway structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered stone archway, transitioning from the open terrace to a sheltered passage. The space is darker, lit only by artificial lanterns, with massive stone columns and decorative urns flanking the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open castle terrace with central statue

events.description: exiting the archway into the open terrace area
beginning to ascend the stone staircase

agents.ego_description: walking past the stone statue and approaching the staircase to the upper level

entered.detail: large stone statue on a circular pedestal in the center of the terrace
wide stone staircase leading up to the next level
stone railing along the edge of the terrace
tall castle tower with illuminated windows visible in the background

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the archway into an open terrace, the character passes a prominent stone statue on a pedestal. The area is wide and open to the night sky, with a stone balustrade on the left and a castle tower visible in the background. The character approaches and begins ascending a wide stone staircase.

events.description: reaching the top of the stairs and continuing forward
passing through the stone gate to the outer terrace

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone staircase alongside the castle wall, then walking along the upper terrace

entered.detail: ornate stone archway with iron gates at the top of the stairs
black iron gates set within the stone archway
snowy mountain peaks visible in the distance beyond the castle walls

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone staircase flanked by castle walls and vintage lanterns, reaching the top where a stone gate arch stands. Passing through the gate reveals a view of snow-covered mountains in the distance as the character continues along the upper terrace.

events.description: fire braziers become the primary light source, casting orange glow
reaching the stone bridge with burning fire bowls

agents.ego_description: walking down the stairs toward the fire-lit bridge, passing burning braziers

entered.detail: large stone bowl with bright orange flames lighting the path
stone bridge with ornate railings spanning across the lower area
flaming fire bowl on a stone pedestal beside the bridge entrance
snow-laden trees visible in the misty background

segments.scene_description: The character descends a staircase where fire braziers provide the primary illumination, casting a warm orange glow against the cold blue night. The path leads to a stone bridge adorned with burning fire bowls, with snow-covered trees visible in the misty background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy castle terrace that transitions from an open walkway through a sheltered passage and back into a wide courtyard. It begins by following the character along a snow-dusted path flanked by a tall stone wall and warm vintage street lamps under a dark blue sky. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts from the open air into a darker, covered stone archway framed by massive columns and decorative urns. The camera then emerges from the shelter back into the night air, passing a prominent stone statue on a pedestal beside a stone balustrade. Finally, the view expands to reveal a distant castle tower as the character approaches and begins ascending a wide stone staircase.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends a castle terrace before descending toward a bridge illuminated by fire. It begins with the character climbing a stone staircase flanked by vintage lanterns, moving upward until they pass through a stone gate arch. As the character emerges onto the upper terrace, the view expands to reveal distant snow-covered mountains under a cold night sky. The scene then shifts as the character descends another staircase, where the lighting transitions from the soft glow of lanterns to the intense orange flicker of fire braziers. Finally, the path leads across a stone bridge adorned with burning fire bowls, moving toward a misty background of snow-covered trees.
